headline: Assessing Tikehau Capital (ENXTPA:TKO) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: Framing Tikehau Capital after recent performance Tikehau Capital (ENXTPA:TKO) has seen mixed recent share performance, with a 4.0% gain over the past week contrasting with a 4.4% decline over the past month and a slight negative move over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Tikehau Capital. Looking beyond the recent bounce, Tikehau Capital’s 4.56% year to date share price return sits against a 0.62% 1 year total shareholder return and a weaker 3 and 5 year total shareholder record,...
